claim: Apply the analogical structure in atom ATOM_T005_S001_ANA_01 ("At the same time, there's a long way to go in some other application areas li...") to the open problem framed in atom ATOM_T001_S046_OPE_01 ("However, many of these broader challenges remain open problems. And going for...").

why_potentially_useful: Open problems gain a candidate solution shape from the analogy's source domain; the source domain's known constraints become hypotheses for the target.
